targetCanvasId.description: Canvas ID to invoke the workflow on. Must be in the same workspace as the caller (cross-workspace invokes require explicit cross-tenant-allowed config — host-policy).

workflowId.description: Workflow to invoke on the target canvas. Resolved against the target canvas's registered workflows.

awaitTerminal.description: When true, this node suspends until the child run reaches a terminal state. When false, returns immediately with the child runId.

timeoutMs.description: Only meaningful when awaitTerminal=true. Bounded to 1 hour. On timeout, returns with `terminalStatus: 'pending'`.

circuitBreaker.description: Per spec/v1/rest-endpoints.md circuit-breaker semantics: host-side throttling when the same caller workflow + target combination exceeds error/latency thresholds.
